security.csp: default-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:*; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:*; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:*; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:* data:; font-src 'self' data: https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:* https://fonts.googleapis.com https://fonts.gstatic.com

bundle.longDescription: Download open-source models and run them on windhover-engine with a hard RAM ceiling. Sparse working-set inference for Apple Silicon and Windows.
